servicesGrid.heading: Our Services
servicesGrid.subheading: We do more than deliver your packages — we create value. By adapting our services to your specific needs, we let you focus on your core business while we manage the entire logistics chain.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by Hundreds of Merchants
testimonials.subheading: Real feedback from e-commerce businesses who ship with us every day.
testimonials.sideText: From solo sellers to growing brands, our clients trust us to handle their deliveries with care, speed, and transparency — every single time.

featured.name: Mustefa Wado
featured.text: Great experience with Hand to Hand Express  Reliable, professional, and excellent customer service. My parcel arrived safely and on time.

items.name: Melkamu Abraraw
items.text: I’ve used Hand to Hand Express multiple times and they never disappoint. Deliveries are always on time and packages arrive in perfect condition. Highly recommended for anyone who needs fast and reliable delivery in the city.

items.name: Mentesnot Zewude
items.text: Great express delivery service at a reasonable price. I like how efficient they are even during busy days. Definitely my go-to delivery service now.

items.name: Mustefa Wado
items.text: Great experience with Hand to Hand Express  Reliable, professional, and excellent customer service. My parcel arrived safely and on time.

items.name: Nora Isaiah
items.text: I highly recommend Hand to Hand Express for anyone looking for a dependable courier service. They handle packages with the utmost care, ensuring everything arrives safely and in perfect condition. Their service is consistently fast, professional, and reliable every single time. It makes shipping completely stress-free.

footer.companyDescription: H2H Express is a fast, reliable delivery service dedicated to connecting businesses and customers across Ethiopia and beyond with exceptional logistics solutions.
footer.missionStatement: To provide fast, secure, and transparent delivery services that empower businesses to grow and customers to trust.

whyChooseUs.sub: We move parcels the way they should be moved — fast, safe, and with full visibility from pickup to doorstep.

features.title: Same-day delivery
features.description: Order by noon, delivered by evening. We don't hold your parcels overnight.

features.title: Live tracking
features.description: Real-time GPS updates so you and your customer always know where the package is.

features.title: Insured shipments
features.description: Every package is covered. If something goes wrong, we make it right — no questions asked.

features.title: 24/7 support
features.description: A real person picks up. Our ops team is on call around the clock, every day of the year.

hero.subtitle: H2H Express Delivery connects people and businesses with lightning-fast, door-to-door logistics solutions across the region.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: To redefine last-mile delivery by combining cutting-edge technology with human care — ensuring every package arrives safely, swiftly, and with a smile.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: To become the most trusted express delivery network in East Africa, setting the standard for speed, reliability, and customer experience.

our_story.label: Our Story
our_story.title: Built With Passion, Driven By Purpose
our_story.paragraph1: We started with a simple belief — delivery should be fast, reliable, and human-centered. What began as a local logistics initiative has grown into a trusted delivery network serving businesses and communities across the region.
our_story.paragraph2: Through technology, dedication, and customer trust, we continue to redefine last-mile delivery while maintaining the personal touch that sets us apart.

cta.heading: Ready to Ship Smarter?
cta.text: Join thousands of businesses that trust H2H Express for their critical deliveries.

About.heroParagraph: H2H Express was built for one reason — because businesses and people deserve a delivery partner that actually shows up. Fast, trackable, and honest.
About.storyBody:
H2H Express started in Addis Ababa with a simple idea: hand-to-hand delivery, done right.

We saw how broken logistics was for small businesses — late shipments, zero tracking, unreliable couriers. So we built the alternative. Today we serve thousands of customers across the region.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: Same-day delivery is our standard, not an upgrade.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: Live tracking and honest communication, always.

values.title: Care
values.desc: Every parcel handled like it belongs to family.

About.ctaSub: Join thousands of businesses that trust H2H Express.

coverageArea.title: Our coverage area
coverageArea.description: We serve thousands of lanes across Canada & Ethiopia. When your network aligns with ours, you gain access to our dependable service and competitive pricing. We offer Intermodal shipping within our coverage areas.
coverageArea.mapAlt: Coverage area map showing service locations

trustedPartners.title: Trusted by industry leaders
trustedPartners.description: We are trusted by the most reliable companies in both Canada and Ethiopia that use our services.

express.title: Express Delivery
express.description: With H2H Express, we provide fast and reliable express delivery services across both Canada and Ethiopia. Whether it’s urgent documents, important parcels, or time-sensitive items, our team ensures secure handling and rapid delivery so your packages arrive safely and on time, no matter the distance.

sameDay.title: Same-Day Delivery
sameDay.description: For time-sensitive packages, our same-day delivery ensures your items reach their destination before 6 PM. We handle every delivery with care and efficiency, so your packages are delivered on time, every time.

nextDay.title: Next-Day Delivery
nextDay.description: For non-urgent deliveries, our next-day service is both cost-effective and efficient. Ideal for packages up to 1kg, we guarantee safe delivery within 24 hours, providing peace of mind at an affordable price.

additional.title: Additional Services
additional.description: From proactive customer support and professional drivers to secure, rapid bank transfers, H2H Express protects your brand and optimizes your business operations every step of the way.

questions.q2: What types of shipping services do you offer?

answers.a1: Yes, we offer international shipping to a wide range of countries. Please check our shipping policy or contact customer support for specific destination availability.
answers.a2: We provide several shipping options including standard, expedited, and express services.
answers.a3: Absolutely. Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email.
answers.a4: Delivery times vary depending on the shipping method and destination.
